content: Fix ReasoningEngine: missing imports, suspend buildPrompt, unused param, decompose empty fallback, extract interaction ID
Fix MemorySchema: missing Flow import, TypeConverters, add BehaviorModule/ModuleSnapshot entities, fix SQL query alias
Fix MemorySystem: missing imports, implement missing methods, implement cosineSimilarity, fix EmbeddingWrapper types
Fix ContextManager: missing imports, implement all methods, add session ID
Fix ApprovalGate: add feedbackDao dependency, fix missing classes, persist proposals
Fix CodeModificationEngine: implement missing DAO methods, FailurePattern class
Fix BehaviorModule: add to AgentDatabase, add DAOs, TypeConverters
Fix AgentViewModel: implement all missing methods, concurrency guard, viewModelScope
Fix Nexa SDK adapter wrapper for safe API access
